CREATOR INTRODUCTION HERE:

Hello! I go by a different name nowadays by my small fine group and in my personal life, but I would prefer to be called by simply "Beans", but I'm okay as well if ppl wanna call me by my J.AI name here too. for basic info, I'm a 19 year old here, kinda still a young adult. I'm like anyone else, doing my own thing, trying to keep my hands busy, find a ACTUAL JOB AND APPLY FOR IT IN MY TOWN, ONE THAT'S WORTH A DAMN, AND A GOOD FIRST STARTER JOB (i want a Job at a Nice lil Thrift Store where i live at,..good simple starter ii feel, and like nostalgic stores! :D ) and uh... THE INDEED APP, THAT SHIT IS RIDGED LIKE EVERYTHING ELSE NOW THESE DAY I Feel (i tried 4 to 5 times to apply, and never once did it work). I've been on J.AI since 2025 of last year. I've learned quickly on how AI all works, proxies, models, lots of stuff i never knew of before, really thank this website because learned lot about AI, how it works, and both the good and bad sides of A as a broad topic, both in a controversial light and when ppl actually use it for good(which is quite rare, or complicated,..but in the end, its a tool. and should be used with respect still and with a neutral grain of salt, Including LLM). Personally, I just use the LLM model AI's, and only for my RP's when I want to cope and journal down my emotions and thoughts to help better process and interpret it all. (NO, I DON'T USE IT AS A DAMN REPLACEMENT FOR A THERAPIST, I HAVE OPEN ALREADY AND I AM AWARE OF THAT ASPECT, DON'T DO IT, I SAY IT NOW AS A DISCLAIMER JUST IN CASE, DON'T FUCKING DO IT GUYS). I am also a small artist. I keep to myself though with my art and talent, but I have tried to post my art before on Instagram and Tik Tok (with little success I feel like sadly). but maybe i could try and make a custom pfp image later on for the bot if you guys would like to see that!

Okay, I'm done ranting up above now, onward's to the juice & why I'm here in the first place below.

MY FIRST BOT, & MY PLANS FOR THIS BOT (current & far future ideas/brainstorming ramble, my thoughts):

I'm here today because yes,...i Do like Zeyn Syre, and this is my bot
